creator: root@cooltrainer.org
text:
Created attachment 219029
Update dns/ddclient from v3.9.0 to v3.9.1

- added support for Yandex.Mail for Domain DNS service
- added support for NearlyFreeSpeech.net
- added support for DNS Made Easy
- added systemd instructions
- added support for dondominio.com
- updated perl instruction
- updated fritzbox instructions
- fixed multidomain support for namecheap
- fixed support for Yandex

==================================================

Before and after:

[root@CURUS#ddclient] service ddclient restart
Stopping ddclient.
Waiting for PIDS: 64175.
Starting ddclient.
WARNING:  file /usr/local/etc/ddclient.conf, line 10: Invalid Value for keyword 'protocol' = 'dnsmadeeasy'
